title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.040 - Failure to give bond, office to become vacant
text:
60.040.  Failure to give bond, office to become vacant. — If any county surveyor fail to give such bond in the time prescribed in section 60.030, his office shall be vacant.
(RSMo 1939 § 13193) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11574; 1919 § 12712; 1909 § 11294
